headline: Bitcoin Plunges 5% to $58K on 4.1% US PCE

article.title: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
article.summary: Bitcoin fell to 21-month lows as stock market volatility accompanied three-year highs in US PCE inflation, leading to $600 million in hourly crypto liquidations.

headline: $10B Crypto Firms Surge on AI Potential

article.title: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
article.summary: Galaxy Digital’s stock surge points to a new trend: Investors are rewarding some crypto firms for AI infrastructure, not just digital asset exposure.

headline: China Raises €5B in Euro Bond Sale

article.title: China Raises €5 Billion in Record Euro Bond Sale
article.summary: China sold €5 billion ($5.7 billion) of euro-denominated bonds, its biggest ever deal in the currency and the second in seven months.

headline: US Spending Rises 0.5% Amid 3.9% Inflation Spike

article.title: US Consumer Spending Picks Up as Inflation Hits Three-Year High
article.summary:
US consumer spending accelerated in May even as prices rose at the fastest pace in more than three years, suggesting Americans are powering through the fallout from the Iran war.
Rob Sockin, Chief US Economist at PGIM Credit, reacts to the PCE data and explains how the Fed might react to the numbers
